title: Rolling Stones: At the Max
original_title: The Rolling Stones: Live at the Max
overview: A filming of the 1990 Rolling Stones "Steel Wheels" concert that traveled Europe. This was filmed in the IMAX process, which allows the film to be projected in a size ten times the size of a regular 35mm projected image.
